subject: reading
activity_templates: A kindergarten sight-words worksheet featuring Dolch pre-primer words (a, and, away, big, blue, can, come, down, find, for, funny, go, help, here, I, in, is, it, jump, little, look, make). A 4x3 grid of boxes, each with one sight word in big friendly letters. {{character}} reads a book at the side.

A trace-and-write sight-word worksheet. Target sight word at top in large dotted outline; three rows for tracing and two blank lines for independent writing. A cartoon kid sentence with the word in a speech bubble. {{character}} sits below.
A sight-word-search worksheet. A 6x6 grid with letters; 5 sight words hidden among them (horizontal and vertical). Word bank on the right. {{character}} holds a magnifying glass.
A 'color by sight word' worksheet. A cute cartoon picture made of shapes each labeled with a sight word. Color key at the top. Child colors according to the key. {{character}} holds crayons.
